title: Merdeka Generation Package
text:
Merdeka Generation Package - SupportGoWhere
Merdeka Generation Package
Share link
Supporting Merdeka Generation seniors in their silver years by helping them to stay active, healthy and providing peace of mind over future healthcare costs.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Provides various health-related benefits to support seniors’ ageing, such as additional Outpatient Care subsidies and additional MediShield (MSHL) premium subsidies
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provides the following benefits to support healthcare for Merdeka seniors:




Additional Outpatient Care Subsidies 



	

Additional subsidies for outpatient care at polyclinics, public Specialist Outpatient Clinics and Community Health Assist Scheme clinics.




Additional MediShield Life Premium Subsidies 

	

Provides an additional 5% subsidy for your annual premiums, increasing to 10% after turning 75 years old.




[Redemption has ended wef. 31 Dec 2023] 
$100 Passion Silver Card Top-Up

	

One-off $100 top-up for use on active ageing programmes, public transport, merchant benefits etc (redemption has ceased wef. 31 Dec 2023).




[Top-Up has ended] 
Annual MediSave top-ups of $200 (2019-2023)

	

$200 Medisave top-ups annually from 2019 to 2023. 

MediSave can be used to cover hospitalisation and treatment costs, pay various medical-related premiums etc.




[Incentives have ceased]
CareShield Life Additional Participation Incentives 

	

Provides participation incentives (totalling $3,000 spread across 10 years) for seniors who join CareShield Life by 31 Dec 2024, in addition to any other premium subsidies seniors may receive.




If you would like more details on the above benefits as well as other useful information about this Package, please refer here.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens who were:

born from 1 January 1950 to 31 December 1959; and became citizens on or before 31 December 1996, or

born on or before 31 December 1949; became citizens on or before 31 December 1996; and are not currently receiving the Pioneer Generation Package

You may check your eligibility via the LifeSG app or the Singpass Mobile app

How to apply?

No application required

Eligible individuals will receive the benefits automatically

Where can I find help?

View more details

For general enquiries on Merdeka Generation eligibility, MediSave top-ups and MediShield Life Subsidy: 1800-222-2888

For loss of Merdeka Generation Card, and other healthcare-related enquiries: 1800-650-6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 11 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
